title: calyptranthes paniculata
intro: Calyptranthes paniculata, also known as the Panicled Lantana, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Calyptranthes paniculata is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in traditional herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
